title: ornithopus micranthus
intro: Ornithopus micranthus, also known as the small-leaf broom bush, is a perennial herb native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Ornithopus micranthus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
